title: OpenAI Discontinues Support for Sora, Winds Down Disney Deal
summary: OpenAI plans to discontinue its Sora AI video generator six months after the high-profile launch of a standalone app for the service, as the company works to simplify its portfolio of artificial intelligence products. The ChatGPT maker and Walt Disney Co. are also winding down their partnership, which had centered on Sora, OpenAI said Tuesday. Disney had previously agreed to license iconic characters including Mickey Mouse and Cinderella to OpenAI for use on Sora and to take a $1 billion stake i

title: Meta, Google Found Liable in First Social Media Addiction Trial
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. and Alphabet Inc.’s Google must pay damages to a 20-year-old woman who said her addiction to social media caused her mental health struggles, a jury concluded in a landmark decision that could signal hefty risks for the companies as they fight thousands of similar claims.

title: Japan to expand hospital oversight to curb for-profit medicine
ソニー・ホンダ AFEELA開発中止
米中首脳会談 5月14日・15日に
Iran has no intention to hold talks with U.S; foreign minister says Trump proposal to end war being reviewed
summary: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

title: Arm’s stock shoots to best day in a year as an Nvidia-like chapter may be starting
summary: Arm could dominate the CPU market the way Nvidia has come to dominate the GPU market, an analyst says.

title: ハンガリー ウクライナへの天然ガス供給を停止へ 対立深まる
summary: ハンガリーのオルバン首相は、ウクライナへの天然ガスの供給を停止すると明らかにし、ロシアによる軍事侵攻をめぐり、ウクライナと、ロシア寄りの姿勢を示すハンガリーとの対立が一段と深まっています。

title: 米メタとグーグルに損害賠償評決、若者に危険なプラットフォーム設計巡り
